examples: Renault's competitor PSA Peugeot Citroen is "extremely vigilant" about the risks of industrial espionage.
However, a different explanation is necessary in cases where the vigilant behavior is not directed at predators.
While such vigilant tracking of cancer is a good thing in general, researchers are increasingly questioning whether all of this testing is necessary for the elderly.
Teams years ago weren't nearly as vigilant about background research as they are now.
Companies are also becoming more vigilant, as their employees have been implicated in insider-trading cases.
